name: kubevirt_controller
explanation: The check inherits OpenMetricsBaseCheckV2 and points at the KubeVirt Controller's `/metrics` Prometheus endpoint, which it exposes on the pod at a fixed path (port 8443/443). The recommended autodiscovery pattern in the README uses `https://%%host%%:%%port%%/metrics`, so once the pod is identified, host+port+/metrics is sufficient. `kube_namespace` and `kube_pod_name` are tag inputs supplied automatically by Autodiscovery template variables — they don't drive endpoint resolution. No user-supplied credentials are needed; TLS verify is typically disabled or relies on cluster CA. This is the canonical OpenMetrics port-scan case.
notes: No on-disk auto_conf.yaml ships with the integration; autodiscovery pod annotations in the README cover the canonical case. The metrics endpoint is HTTPS on the pod IP.
